# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

name: External Contributor CI

on:
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]

permissions:
  contents: read
  pull-requests: write

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30

    steps:
      - name: Checkout base repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.base.ref }}
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Checkout PR code into isolated directory
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
          path: pr-code
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Validate PR does not modify workflow files
        id: validate
        run: |
          cd pr-code
          CHANGED_FILES=$(git diff --name-only ${{ github.event.pull_request.base.sha }}..${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }} 2>/dev/null || git diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "")
          echo "Changed files:"
          echo "$CHANGED_FILES"

          WORKFLOW_CHANGES=$(echo "$CHANGED_FILES" | grep -E '^\.(github/workflows|github/actions)/' || true)
          if [ -n "$WORKFLOW_CHANGES" ]; then
            echo "has_workflow_changes=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "::error::PR modifies workflow files. Manual review required."
          else
            echo "has_workflow_changes=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: Abort if workflow files modified
        if: steps.validate.outputs.has_workflow_changes == 'true'
        run: |
          echo "This PR modifies CI/CD workflow files and requires manual review before automated testing."
          exit 1

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Install dependencies in sandboxed environment
        id: install
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          npm ci --ignore-scripts 2>&1 | tee install-output.txt
          echo "status=$?" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run linting
        id: lint
        if: steps.install.outcome == 'success'
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          npm run lint 2>&1 | tee lint-output.txt
          echo "status=$?" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run tests
        id: test
        if: steps.install.outcome == 'success'
        working-directory: pr-code
        env:
          CI: true
          NODE_ENV: test
        run: |
          npm test 2>&1 | tee test-output.txt
          echo "status=$?" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run build
        id: build
        if: steps.install.outcome == 'success'
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          npm run build 2>&1 | tee build-output.txt
          echo "status=$?" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Prepare test results comment
        id: results
        if: always()
        run: |
          INSTALL_STATUS="${{ steps.install.outcome }}"
          LINT_STATUS="${{ steps.lint.outcome }}"
          TEST_STATUS="${{ steps.test.outcome }}"
          BUILD_STATUS="${{ steps.build.outcome }}"

          status_emoji() {
            case "$1" in
              success) echo "✅" ;;
              failure) echo "❌" ;;
              skipped) echo "⏭️" ;;
              *) echo "⚠️" ;;
            esac
          }

          OVERALL="success"
          if [ "$INSTALL_STATUS" != "success" ] || [ "$TEST_STATUS" != "success" ] || [ "$BUILD_STATUS" != "success" ]; then
            OVERALL="failure"
          fi

          {
            echo "comment<<COMMENT_EOF"
            echo "## 🤖 Automated CI Results for PR #${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}"
            echo ""
            echo "**Commit:** \`${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}\`"
            echo ""
            echo "| Step | Status |"
            echo "|------|--------|"
            echo "| Install Dependencies | $(status_emoji $INSTALL_STATUS) $INSTALL_STATUS |"
            echo "| Lint | $(status_emoji $LINT_STATUS) $LINT_STATUS |"
            echo "| Tests | $(status_emoji $TEST_STATUS) $TEST_STATUS |"
            echo "| Build | $(status_emoji $BUILD_STATUS) $BUILD_STATUS |"
            echo ""

            if [ "$OVERALL" = "success" ]; then
              echo "### ✅ All checks passed!"
            else
              echo "### ❌ Some checks failed"
              echo ""
              echo "<details>"
              echo "<summary>Click to see failure details</summary>"
              echo ""

              if [ "$INSTALL_STATUS" != "success" ] && [ -f pr-code/install-output.txt ]; then
                echo "#### Install Output (last 30 lines)"
                echo "\`\`\`"
                tail -30 pr-code/install-output.txt | head -100
                echo "\`\`\`"
              fi

              if [ "$LINT_STATUS" = "failure" ] && [ -f pr-code/lint-output.txt ]; then
                echo "#### Lint Output (last 30 lines)"
                echo "\`\`\`"
                tail -30 pr-code/lint-output.txt | head -100
                echo "\`\`\`"
              fi

              if [ "$TEST_STATUS" = "failure" ] && [ -f pr-code/test-output.txt ]; then
                echo "#### Test Output (last 50 lines)"
                echo "\`\`\`"
                tail -50 pr-code/test-output.txt | head -100
                echo "\`\`\`"
              fi

              if [ "$BUILD_STATUS" = "failure" ] && [ -f pr-code/build-output.txt ]; then
                echo "#### Build Output (last 30 lines)"
                echo "\`\`\`"
                tail -30 pr-code/build-output.txt | head -100
                echo "\`\`\`"
              fi

              echo "</details>"
            fi

            echo ""
            echo "---"
            echo "*This is an automated comment from the CI pipeline.*"
            echo "COMMENT_EOF"
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          echo "overall=$OVERALL" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Find existing bot comment
        if: always()
        uses: peter-evans/find-comment@v3
        id: find-comment
        with:
          issue-number: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          comment-author: 'github-actions[bot]'
          body-includes: 'Automated CI Results'

      - name: Post or update results comment
        if: always()
        uses: peter-evans/create-or-update-comment@v4
        with:
          comment-id: ${{ steps.find-comment.outputs.comment-id }}
          issue-number: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          body: ${{ steps.results.outputs.comment }}
          edit-mode: replace

      - name: Set final status
        if: always()
        run: |
          if [ "${{ steps.results.outputs.overall }}" != "success" ]; then
            echo "CI checks failed"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "All CI checks passed"
